---
title: ""
---

::::: {.grid .homepage-hero}
::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4}
![](images/headshot.jpg){.profile-image}
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-8}
# Brady Rippon

I am a biostatistician and software engineer with interests in clinical analysis tools, statistical programming, and data visualization. I am an enthusiastic R and SAS user and love thinking of ways to make research more transparent and approachable. 

```{=html}
<!-- 
[Projects](packages.qmd){.btn .btn-primary}
[Packages](packages.qmd){.btn .btn-outline-primary}
-->
```
:::
:::::

## Background

:::: {.grid}

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
::: {.info-box}
### <i class="bi bi-briefcase-fill"></i> Work

**Research Biostatistician**  
Weill Cornell Medicine

**Adjunct Instructor**  
Columbia University
:::
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
::: {.info-box}
### <i class="bi bi-mortarboard-fill"></i> Education

**M.S., Biostatistics**  
Columbia University

**B.S., Physics**  
University of Scranton
:::
:::

::::

## Current Work

- Reproducible reporting tools in R
- Clinical research workflows
- Statistical dashboards and automation
- R package development
